name: Shared Workflow - CRM Spreadsheet Portal Synchronization

parameters.jsCode: const adapter=$json; const input=$('Validate map and deduplicate').first().json; const adapterProcessed=Number(adapter.records_processed??input.records.length); const adapterFailed=Number(adapter.records_failed??0)+input.failed_record_ids.length; const status=adapterProcessed>0&&adapterFailed>0?'partial':adapterProcessed>0?'success':'error'; return [{json:{event_id:input.event_id,client_id:input.client_id,workflow_name:input.workflow_name,feature_type:input.feature_type,status,records_processed:adapterProcessed,records_failed:adapterFailed,error_message:adapterFailed?`Synchronization failed for ${adapterFailed} record(s)`:null,workflow_steps:[...input.workflow_steps,{step_key:'sync_records',step_name:'Synchronize normalized records',status:status==='error'?'error':status==='partial'?'error':'success'}],entity_refs:input.entity_refs,metadata:{source_system:input.source_system,failed_record_ids:input.failed_record_ids.slice(0,100),field_map:input.field_map}}}];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, event_id: $json.event_id, status: $json.status, records_processed: $json.records_processed, records_failed: $json.records_failed } }}
